lines.speaker: Alon
lines.line: You've been quiet since we arrived. Something on your mind?

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.line: Just watching the innkeeper water down drinks. People never change.

lines.speaker: Alon
lines.line: Or maybe he's stretching coin to feed his family. Have you asked?

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.line: ...No. But that's exactly what he'd say regardless.
